response.overview: Leave the main interstates behind and find a piece of yourself that you may have forgotten along the winding country roads of Europe, each possessing its own character and soul. Over the centuries, these routes were created by people who dreamed of a better life, and thus paved pathways before them to achieve those dreams. Take an extraordinary road trip across the unseen face of Europe.
response.title: Backroads Europe: Switzerland's via Romana
